etymology.description: дё·(дё·, semantic 'divide') + иұ•(иұ•, phonetic 'pig') = link to 'comply, follow along' unclear
etymology.interpretation: The character г’ё combines the semantic element дё·(дё·) (used here without clear semantic contribution) with the phonetic element иұ•(иұ•) (shЗҗ, 'pig'). This character is an ancestral form sometimes found in the historical lineage of related words like йҒӮ(йҒӮ) (suГ¬, 'to follow' or 'to comply').
